name: Healthchecks

seo.title: Healthchecks Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Healthchecks analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. Healthchecks offers custom pricing.
pros: Centralized logs, metrics, and traces in one place
cons: Data ingestion pricing can spike unexpectedly
